title: Affine Springer Fibers and the Affine Matrix Ball Construction for Rectangular Type Nilpotents
author_string: Pablo Boixeda Alvarez, Li Ying, Guangyi Yue
abstract: In this paper, we study the affine Springer fiber $\mathcal{F} l_N$ in type $A$ for rectangular type semisimple nil-element $N$ and calculate the relative position between irreducible components. In particular, we use the affine matrix ball construction to show the relative position map is compatible with the Kazhdan-Lusztig cell structure, generalizing the work of Steinberg and van Leeuwen.
